title: Create: everything you need
description: This modpack is a combination of create mod with other mods. Many mods in this modpack add various new mechanics. If you notice any issues or have any suggestions, please report them to our discord. Here is the link: https://discord.gg/HsTCRXWm
body: This modpack is a combination of create mod with other mods. Many mods in this modpack add various new mechanics. For example, the transcending trident which allows you to fly the trident without rain. If you notice any issues or have any suggestions, please report them to our discord. Here is the link: https://discord.gg/HsTCRXWm
